tasks.name: downsample-1h
tasks.description: 1小时降采样：原始数据聚合为每小时均值/最大/最小
tasks.flux:
from(bucket: "waterwheel_data")
  |> range(start: -2h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "waterwheel_sensor")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> to(bucket: "waterwheel_downsampled_1h", org: "agri-history")

tasks.name: downsample-1d
tasks.description: 1天降采样：1小时聚合进一步聚合为每日统计
tasks.flux:
from(bucket: "waterwheel_downsampled_1h")
  |> range(start: -2d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "waterwheel_sensor")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> to(bucket: "waterwheel_downsampled_1d", org: "agri-history")

tasks.name: alert-stats-1h
tasks.description: 告警统计：每小时告警计数
tasks.flux:
from(bucket: "waterwheel_data")
  |> range(start: -2h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "waterwheel_alert")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: count, createEmpty: false)
  |> to(bucket: "waterwheel_downsampled_1h", org: "agri-history")
